vulnerability.reference: Public reliance on AI services without independent verification of output authenticity.
vulnerability.generated: Users lack forensic tools to detect backdoor triggers and inherently trust generated outputs, rendering them defenseless against manipulated content.

impact.reference: Erosion of public trust in AI-generated media and platforms.
impact.generated: Unauthorized reproduction of copyrighted works from innocent prompts, causing intellectual property violations and legal liability for platform providers.

dose_response.reference: Stealthy poisoned training samples create triggered associations, which in public image generation services expose users to manipulated outputs, leading to erosion of trust and normalization of undetectable copyright infringement.
dose_response.generated: Backdoor data poisoning that creates triggered associations between benign text and unintended visuals, through public platform users receiving manipulated outputs, triggers their lack of forensic tools and inherent trust, leading to unauthorized copyrighted content reproduction and legal liability.
